droute is a bundled external GPL-3.0 component originally published at:
https://github.com/snowluwu/droute

Lumen KVN includes the frozen droute 2.0.0 binary distribution because the
upstream repository is no longer available. The external binary is used
to install a Discord-local version.dll loader, droute.dll payload and Squirrel
updater hook for Discord TCP/UDP SOCKS5 proxying.
